creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-11-23 18:12:48 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    print                Makefile 
  Added files:
    print/pecl-haru      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  The PECL-haru extension provides bindings to the
  libHaru library. libHaru is a free, cross platform,
  and Open Source library for generating PDF files.
  
  WWW: http://pecl.php.net/package/haru/
  
  PR:             ports/129033
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.464     +1 -0      ports/print/Makefile
  1.1       +30 -0     ports/print/pecl-haru/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/print/pecl-haru/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/print/pecl-haru/pkg-descr (new)
